name: Structural Coverage Achieved
description: Structural coverage analysis confirms the achieved coverage appropriate to the DAL (MC/DC at A, decision at B, statement at C).
rationale: DO-178C Table A-7 obj 5-8: structural coverage is analysed — modified condition/decision coverage at DAL A, decision coverage at B, statement coverage at C. No structural coverage objective at DAL D.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
